function.name: _task_finish
function.description: Submit task execution results and update the task status to completed or failed. Used to record results, status, and related information after task execution ends.

id.description: Task ID, used to identify the task that needs to be updated

success.description: Whether the task was successfully completed. true means success, false means execution failed

result.description: Task execution result summary (fill in when successful), used to record output or conclusions

errorMessage.description: Error message (required when failed), used to describe the reason for failure

output.description: Structured output results (optional), used to store task output data, such as JSON results, generated content, etc.
